resultList.dtldesc: Discover an exceptional living experience in the prestigious DLF Capital Greens 1 and 2, situated in the heart of Moti Nagar, New Delhi. This exquisite residence offers a perfect balance of modern luxury and serene surroundings, making it an ideal home for those seeking a sophisticated lifestyle in one of Delhis most sought-after neighbourhoods.Property SpecificationsThis well-appointed 3 BHK apartment spans a generous 1500 sq. ft, providing an expansive and thoughtfully planned layout. Located on the 16th floor of a 30-storey building, the apartment features high-quality marble flooring throughout, adding an elegant touch to the living space. The unit comprises three spacious bedrooms, three modern bathrooms, and two balconies that offer lovely views of the surrounding garden and park areas. It is semi-furnished and has been meticulously maintained, reflecting a contemporary design that ensures both comfort and style.FacilitiesThe DLF Capital Greens 1 and 2 complex is designed to provide a comprehensive and luxurious living environment. Residents benefit from a range of high-end amenities, including a fully equipped gymnasium, a swimming pool, and dedicated kids play areas with water slides. The society also features a clubhouse, a banquet hall, multipurpose courts, and indoor squash and badminton courts. Ensuring the utmost convenience and safety, the premises offer 247 security with CCTV surveillance, reserved parking for residents, reliable power backup, and dedicated maintenance staff. Additional features such as a jogging track, cycling path, and beautiful flower gardens enhance the overall quality of life.LocalityMoti Nagar is a prime and well-connected locality in West Delhi, known for its excellent infrastructure and community-focused environment. The residence is strategically located near the Moti Nagar metro station, providing seamless connectivity to the rest of the city. The area is well-serviced by reputable educational institutions and is situated near essential public transport hubs. Its proximity to key commercial and residential centres, combined with the tranquil green spaces maintained within the complex, makes it a premier destination for families and professionals looking for a balanced urban life.

resultList.dtldesc: Discover a comfortable and well-connected lifestyle with this thoughtfully designed 2 BHK apartment in Block 56, Ashok Nagar, New Delhi. Situated in a well-established residential neighbourhood, this ready-to-move home offers a balanced combination of convenience, functionality and pleasant surroundings. With essential social infrastructure and metro connectivity nearby, the property serves as an ideal option for families as well as working professionals.Property SpecificationsSpread across a super area of 1200 sq. ft, this semi-furnished apartment is located on the 1st floor of a 4-storey building. The residence has been planned to ensure efficient use of space while maintaining a bright and comfortable living environment with good natural light and ventilation.The apartment comprises two spacious bedrooms and two bathrooms designed for daily comfort and convenience. The living and dining areas currently follow a combined layout, while offering flexibility for separation if required in the future according to personal preferences and space requirements.A well-planned modular kitchen is available with practical fittings and sufficient workspace to support everyday cooking needs. Marbonite flooring enhances the visual appeal of the interiors while adding durability and ease of maintenance. The apartment is Vaastu compliant and benefits from an East-facing orientation, which is preferred by many homebuyers.Residents can enjoy pleasant views of the surrounding society area, greenery and the 80-feet road, creating a bright and refreshing atmosphere within the home. The property also includes both covered and open parking facilities for added convenience.FacilitiesThe apartment provides essential facilities designed for comfortable living. Regular water supply arrangements are available to support daily requirements. Power backup provision has also been planned for additional convenience during interruptions.The development further includes lift access and security arrangements, ensuring a safe and comfortable residential environment for residents.LocalityThe property enjoys a strategic location with Tandoor Chowk serving as a prominent nearby landmark. Schools and hospitals are available within approximately 100 metres, ensuring quick access to educational and healthcare facilities.Subhash Nagar Metro Station and Tilak Nagar Metro Station are both situated around 1 km away, offering convenient connectivity across different parts of Delhi. The locality also provides easy access to markets, shopping facilities and other day-to-day conveniences, making it a practical and desirable residential destination.

resultList.dtldesc: Experience elevated urban living in the thriving residential hub of Sector 84, Gurgaon. Ideally located near Euro International School, Genesis Hospital, Elan Miracle Mall and Entertainland Mall, this ready-to-move builder floor offers an excellent blend of comfort, convenience and connectivity. With spacious interiors, modern features and a well-developed social infrastructure, it is an ideal choice for families seeking a contemporary lifestyle in a prime residential location.::::Property Specifications::::Spread across a super built-up area of 2025 sq. ft, this semi-furnished builder floor is thoughtfully designed to provide a comfortable and functional living environment. The residence comprises four spacious bedrooms, four well-appointed bathrooms and four balconies, allowing abundant natural light and ventilation throughout the home. Its advantageous positioning within the development ensures enhanced privacy and an open, airy ambience.::::The living and dining areas are thoughtfully separated, creating an inviting space for both everyday living and family gatherings. The kitchen features a practical layout and offers the flexibility to be customised according to individual preferences. Elegant tile flooring enhances the overall appeal while ensuring durability and easy maintenance.::::The balconies overlook Euro International School and the surrounding residential landscape, offering pleasant views and adding to the charm of the property. The well-planned layout and generous living spaces make this home ideal for modern family living.::::Facilities::::The property is equipped with essential amenities to ensure a comfortable and hassle-free lifestyle. Residents benefit from a continuous 24-hour water supply and the convenience of two covered parking spaces. Dedicated security arrangements and CCTV surveillance provide a safe and secure living environment.::::Additional conveniences include power backup support and well-maintained common areas. The community also features landscaped parks and an open-air gym, offering excellent recreational and fitness options for residents of all age groups.::::Locality::::Situated in the well-established neighbourhood of Sector 84, Gurgaon, this property enjoys excellent connectivity to key destinations across the city. Reputed educational institutions, including Euro International School, are located nearby, making daily commuting convenient for families with children. Healthcare needs are well catered to, with Genesis Hospital situated just opposite the property and several other medical facilities within easy reach.::::The residence is also close to Elan Miracle Mall and Entertainland Mall, providing easy access to shopping, dining and entertainment options. Supported by well-connected road networks and nearby metro connectivity, this location ensures seamless travel and everyday convenience, making it a desirable address for modern urban living.
